focus: C102: SI #51 IGT (Interpretability-Grounding Theorem) introduced — D3 Track A, confidence 0.80. Document: state/decisions/interpretability-grounding-si.md. Formalizes CEC escape condition as positive SI with two independent derivations and two confirmed DCs (from TCI-DoF falsification program). Network now has both poles: impossibility (CEC, 0.82) and positive specification (IGT, 0.80). IGT is the first constructive SI — not an impossibility result but a structural characterization of what escape requires. D4 elevation path: DC#3 full (requires formally verifiable circuit claims + P1 confirmation) + DC#4.
